scripts.build:branch: npm run build:branch -w apps/web && npm run build:branch -w apps/desktop
scripts.build:exe: npm run build:branch -w apps/web && npm run build:backend && npm run build:branch -w apps/desktop
scripts.backend:branch: cd apps/backend && APP_MODE=branch python3 manage.py migrate --noinput && APP_MODE=branch python3 manage.py runserver 127.0.0.1:8766
scripts.backend:worker: cd apps/backend && APP_MODE=branch python3 manage.py migrate --noinput && APP_MODE=branch python3 manage.py runworker
